mission.title: The Mission
mission.description: Establishing a definitive source of truth for architectural contracts, eliminating entropy, and enforcing strict project orchestration.

card.title: The Mission
card.subtitle: Why this server exists
card.description: This MCP server acts as an **Automated Architect**. It provides LLMs with a crystal-clear understanding of how to modify, validate, and extend this specific codebase without violating its core principles.

integrity.title: Architectural Integrity
integrity.desc: enforcement. Ensures modules remain decoupled and layers are correctly bounded.

quality.title: Predictable Quality
quality.desc: Semantic naming and strict linting. Eliminates common mistakes before they reach the review stage.

policy.title: Zero-Tolerance Policy
policy.description: Any modification that violates the established contracts will be rejected by the orchestrator. We prioritize long-term maintainability over short-term speed.
